# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Client Setup

Create and configure the API client.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [client](client.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.client) | Create a socialinfrascorepy API client. |
| [SIClient](SIClient.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.SIClient) | Lightweight, immutable configuration object used by every API call. |

## Authentication

User sign-up, sign-in, password reset, and account deletion.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [sign_up](sign_up.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.sign_up) | Sign up a new user. |
| [sign_in](sign_in.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.sign_in) | Sign in with email and password. |
| [send_password_reset](send_password_reset.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.send_password_reset) | Request a password-reset email for the signed-in user. |
| [delete_account](delete_account.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.delete_account) | Delete the currently authenticated account. |

## Polygon Lookup

Search and retrieve neighborhood boundaries.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [search_locations](search_locations.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.search_locations) | Search for locations by place name. |
| [get_boundary_by_osm_id](get_boundary_by_osm_id.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_boundary_by_osm_id) | Get boundary by OpenStreetMap ID. |
| [get_boundary_by_location_id](get_boundary_by_location_id.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_boundary_by_location_id) | Get boundary by location ID. |
| [get_boundary_by_area_id](get_boundary_by_area_id.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_boundary_by_area_id) | Get boundary by area ID. |
| [get_boundary_by_place_name](get_boundary_by_place_name.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_boundary_by_place_name) | Get boundary by place name. |

## Themes and Keywords

Browse available social-infrastructure themes and keywords.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [get_themes](get_themes.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_themes) | List available social-infrastructure themes. |
| [get_theme_keywords](get_theme_keywords.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_theme_keywords) | List keywords for given theme IDs. |

## Scorecard and Sites

Retrieve scorecard results and social-infrastructure sites.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [get_scorecard](get_scorecard.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_scorecard) | Get scorecard results for a location. |
| [get_sites](get_sites.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_sites) | Get social-infrastructure sites for a location. |

## Requests

Submit requests and track processing status.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [submit_request](submit_request.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.submit_request) | Submit a scorecard request for a new area. |
| [get_request_status](get_request_status.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_request_status) | Get status of a submitted request. |
| [get_requests](get_requests.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_requests) | Get request history for the current user. |

## Account and Usage

Subscription tier, usage summary, and remaining quota.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [get_subscription](get_subscription.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_subscription) | Get current subscription profile. |
| [get_usage](get_usage.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_usage) | Get usage summary for a date range. |
| [get_remaining_queries](get_remaining_queries.qmd#socialinfrascorepy.get_remaining_queries) | Get remaining monthly query quota. |
